current.invariant: ez-ax runtime graph contains no LLM inference. ez-ax remains orchestration-centric. The execution backend is PyAutoGUI (OS-level coordinate click). Browser-internal tools (Playwright, CDP) are forbidden as execution backend. The released ceiling is runCompletion with all 12 missions released. Canonical continuation memory remains two-tiered: work-rag for current state, rag for durable lessons. OpenClaw is the external caller; ez-ax owns the CUA engine (PyAutoGUI).

history.milestone: Phase R79 heuristic gap scan complete — all released-scope clauses below pageReadyObserved have dedicated test coverage
history.summary: Phase R79 heuristic gap scan: Completed comprehensive PRD clause verification scan. Identified uncovered clause: 'released-scope implementation includes all missions below pageReadyObserved in correct sequence and phase' (PRD Release Boundary section, lines 53-63, specifically the execution-phase missions after pageReadyObserved boundary). Created dedicated unit test test_released_scope_implementation_includes_all_missions_below_page_ready_observation() in tests/unit/test_released_missions_specification.py with focused verification that all 8 execution-phase missions (sync_observation, target_actionability_observation, armed_state_entry, trigger_wait, click_dispatch, click_completion, success_observation, run_completion) are present, released (not modeled-only), and form a contiguous pipeline from the pageReadyObserved boundary to the released ceiling (runCompletion). Test validates both the structural integrity of the execution phase and its proper relationship to the pre-execution setup phase. All 638 unit tests pass (637 existing + 1 new). Coverage ledger family 'Phase R79 heuristic gap scan' marked as covered. No additional pending families remain in coverage ledger. Phase R79 complete — FINAL_STOP reached. All coverage-ledger families (R3-R79) are now complete and verified.
evidence: Added test_released_scope_implementation_includes_all_missions_below_page_ready_observation() to test_released_missions_specification.py

history.summary: Phase R78 heuristic gap scan: Completed PRD clause verification scan. Created dedicated unit test test_all_stages_are_released() in tests/unit/test_released_missions_specification.py with focused verification that all 12 released missions are released (not modeled), complete (no gaps from attach_session to run_completion), and form a contiguous executable pipeline. All 637 unit tests pass (636 existing + 1 new). Coverage ledger family 'Phase R78 heuristic gap scan' marked as covered. No additional pending families remain in coverage ledger. Phase R78 complete — FINAL_STOP reached. All released-scope PRD clauses now have dedicated test coverage.

history.milestone: Phase R77 heuristic gap scan complete — intentional stop at released ceiling tested and verified
history.summary: Phase R77 heuristic gap scan: Completed PRD clause verification scan. Identified uncovered clause: 'intentional stop at the released ceiling' (PRD Release Boundary section, line 61). Created dedicated test file test_released_scope_intentional_stop_at_ceiling.py with two focused unit tests: (1) test_released_scope_stops_exactly_at_run_completion — verifies released scope executes exactly 12 missions and stops at run_completion without any further execution attempts; (2) test_released_scope_enforces_no_missions_beyond_ceiling — confirms the execution graph prevents missions beyond the released ceiling. All 636 unit tests pass (634 existing + 2 new). Coverage ledger family 'Phase R77 heuristic gap scan' marked as covered. No additional pending families remain in coverage ledger. Phase R77 complete — FINAL_STOP reached.

history.phase: Phases R67-R75 (scope expansion, heuristic gap scans, boundary, memory model, and execution verification)
history.milestone: Comprehensive foundation for Phase R76+: 12-mission pipeline with full released-scope coverage, boundary markers, memory layers, and execution verification
history.summary: Compressed 5 checkpoint/summary entries from Phases R67-R75 into consolidated milestone summary. Phase R67 promoted all modeled missions to released scope and established 12-mission pipeline (attach→runCompletion). Phases R69-R70 added mission node execution tests and intentional-stop coverage. Phase R73 identified and tested page_ready_observation boundary marking, canonical memory paths (work-rag.json and rag.json). Phase R75 tested OpenClaw-only execution actor constraint. This consolidated work established the foundation for the subsequent heuristic gap scan phases (R76+), providing 632 passing tests with complete released-scope structure, boundary enforcement, and architectural constraints verified.
